headline: Thishan Priyamantha wins Best Digital Marketing Strategist of the Year
standfirst: Thishan Priyamantha is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best Digital Marketing Strategist of the Year, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Thishan Priyamantha and the award record

Thishan Priyamantha is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Digital Marketing Strategist of the Year. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Thishan Priyamantha, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

LinkedIn identifies Thishan Priyamantha as a Digital Marketing Strategist at DigiBranding International. Instagram self-reports the same GBE award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best Digital Marketing Strategist of the Year record matters

The Best Digital Marketing Strategist of the Year recognition places Thishan Priyamantha in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
Award title: Best Digital Marketing Strategist of the Year.
Recipient profile reviewed against available source notes.

Source notes reviewed for this page include gbeaward.com, lk.linkedin.com, instagram.com. These references are used to confirm identity, business activity, programme identity, or award context. Where a source is a social profile, directory listing, booking platform, or press article rather than a recipient-owned website, the article keeps the claim narrow and avoids treating that source as proof of wider performance.
For the Best Digital Marketing Strategist of the Year page, that source trail anchors the story to the exact award record instead of a broad promotional profile.

Imported image is unrelated; personal/social sources are limited beyond GBE and LinkedIn. This limitation matters because the site should not turn a winner listing into inflated SEO copy. It should help people discover the award record while keeping every visible claim defensible.
The Best Digital Marketing Strategist of the Year page therefore stays careful, useful, and defensible for readers checking the public record.

Thishan Priyamantha's winner page will continue to be updated when stronger official sources, rights-cleared media, recipient statements, or ceremony materials are available. Until then, this page prioritises clarity, the official award wording, and source-backed context over generic promotional language.
Future updates to the Best Digital Marketing Strategist of the Year page can add deeper recipient context when stronger evidence is available.
